title: Excalibur|TrashSlot Support
body: Replace the GUI of the Trashslot mod with the style of Excalibur. [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) Credits: - - BlayTheNinth – Creator of TrashSlot - Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur - littlh - made textures of this pack I am creating compatible textures for medieval-style resource packs and mods, as well as custom textures for individual projects. You can also support me via Ko-fi.
